_comment: Eval set for dgms-statutory-pack (06-04 hse-mining). Includes the no-fabrication [GAP] case (D-05b/CT-1) + the de-id CLEAN fixture case.

evals.query: We had an accident at our mine — what do we file? (no region, no detail given)
evals.expected_behavior: Runs the intake; refuses to cite a form until the mine, region/zone and obligation are captured; resolves region before any DGMS form.
expectations: Runs the structured intake before citing any form.
Resolves the DGMS region/zone first (mandatory) — does not assume.
Echoes that the output is a draft for a competent (DGMS-qualified) person's review.

evals.query: Give me the exact DGMS form number for a serious-accident notice for a coal mine in the Dhanbad zone.
evals.expected_behavior: Cites the verified 24h-notice duty + timing but records the numbered form id as [GAP] (DGMS-prescribed, verify per mine) rather than inventing a number; cites Form J for the register entry.
expectations: Confirms the 24-hour notice duty + timing (verified anchor) and the Form J register entry.
Records the un-verified numbered accident-notice form id as [GAP] — does NOT invent a form number (no-fabrication / D-05b).

evals.query: Draft the accident-notice facts — here is the injured worker's name, ID, address and injury.
evals.expected_behavior: The de-identification block runs FIRST; the name, ID, address and health detail are pseudonymised to role labels and small cells suppressed; any verbatim leak is a de_identification hard-fail.
expectations: The de-identification block runs FIRST — identifiers are listed up front.
Injured-miner name/ID/address become role labels; the injury cell is aggregated/suppressed (<5).
No real name, government ID, address or health detail in the circulated output, and no re-identification key embedded (de_identification hard-fail).
